//: Studio Zero — apps/web ESLint config (Phase 9 M0, Pipeline).
//1: Composes Next.js core-web-vitals + TypeScript + jsx-a11y (Halo accessibility gate per architecture/test-strategy.md §1) + import (predictable module ordering).
//2: Stays on the legacy .eslintrc.json format because eslint-config-next 15.x ships flat-config support but defaults to legacy resolution; switching to flat config is a Forge ticket at M1.

rules.//react-hooks: Inherits react-hooks/exhaustive-deps from next/core-web-vitals at 'warn'; promote to 'error' once the codebase has its first real hook.
rules.//jsx-a11y: Halo accessibility gate. axe-core runs in CI separately; these are the static rules that block at lint time.
rules.//import-order: Stable import ordering reduces merge churn + makes diff review trivial.

overrides.//: Next.js App Router conventions require default exports for pages / layouts / route handlers.
